user.title: Set up Adaptive Alerting
user.description: Select a numeric sensor to monitor. The integration will learn its normal range and alert when values deviate significantly.

data_description.sensor_entity_id: Must be a numeric sensor (temperature, humidity, CO2, etc.)
data_description.learning_window_days: How many days of history to use when building the baseline. Default: 14
data_description.sensitivity: How many standard deviations from the mean triggers an alert. Lower = more sensitive. Default: 2.5

error.not_numeric: The selected sensor does not have a numeric state. Please choose a different sensor.
error.entity_not_found: The selected entity could not be found.

abort.already_configured: This sensor is already being monitored.
